sections.paragraph: f. taking away, putting aside, only found in const. זוּלַת, and with suff. זוּלָתִי, זוּלָֽתְךָ as a preposition besides, save, except, e.g. זוּלָתִי besides me, properly I being removed, or more closely still, the removing of me, through the removing of me. 2Ki 24:14 Isa 45:5, 21 Isa 45:21, etc. Sometimes with Yod parag. זוּלָתִי for זוּלַת Deu 1:36 4:12 . Once as a conjunction, for זוּלַת אֲשֶׁר except that, unless that, 1Ki 3:18.
